domain_modules.name: Authentication & Authorization Domain
domain_modules.description: Core security domain responsible for user identity verification, JWT token lifecycle management, and role-based access control (RBAC). This domain implements a dual-token authentication mechanism with access tokens for API authorization and refresh tokens for session extension. It serves as the security foundation for all other domains, providing centralized authentication services via Dubbo RPC.

sub_modules.name: JWT Token Management
sub_modules.description: Manages the complete lifecycle of JWT tokens including generation, validation, refresh, and revocation. Implements RSA-based asymmetric encryption for token signing and Redis-based blacklist for token invalidation.
key_functions: generateAccessToken - Create short-lived access tokens with user claims
generateRefreshToken - Create long-lived refresh tokens stored in Redis
validateAndParseToken - Verify token signature and check blacklist
revokeToken - Invalidate tokens by adding to blacklist

sub_modules.name: Token Validation Service
sub_modules.description: Dubbo RPC service that exposes token validation capabilities to the API Gateway and other microservices. Handles token verification requests and extracts user identity information.
key_functions: validateToken - Verify access token and return user info
revokeToken - Invalidate tokens for logout scenarios

sub_modules.name: Single Sign-On (SSO) Service
sub_modules.description: Consumer-facing authentication service providing login, registration, and session management endpoints. Orchestrates calls between account management and JWT services.
key_functions: login - Authenticate user credentials and issue tokens
refreshToken - Exchange refresh token for new access token

sub_modules.name: Security Configuration
sub_modules.description: Spring Security configuration for stateless JWT-based authentication, password encoding, and security filter chain setup.

domain_modules.name: Account Management Domain
domain_modules.description: Central domain for user identity and account lifecycle management. Handles user registration, authentication credentials, profile management, and RBAC permission system. Supports three user types: Doctor, Patient, and Family Member, each with distinct profile extensions and permission sets.

sub_modules.name: Account Service
sub_modules.description: Core account operations including registration, login verification, profile updates, and password management. Implements secure credential storage with BCrypt hashing and sensitive data encryption.
key_functions: register - Create account with role assignment

sub_modules.name: User Identity Service
sub_modules.description: Specialized service for querying role-specific user profiles. Aggregates base account information with Doctor or Patient extended attributes.
key_functions: getDoctorInfo - Retrieve doctor profile with credentials
getPatientInfo - Retrieve patient profile with medical history

sub_modules.name: Permission Service
sub_modules.description: RBAC permission management service that handles role-permission mappings and permission verification. Supports permission expansion from role codes to granular permission strings.
key_functions: getUserPermission - Get expanded permissions for user
expandToPermissions - Convert role+action to permission strings

sub_modules.name: Account Data Models
sub_modules.description: Persistent objects representing account entities, roles, and permissions with MyBatis-Plus ORM mappings. Includes sensitive data encryption handlers.
key_functions: Account - Base user entity with encrypted fields

domain_modules.name: Health Report Center Domain
domain_modules.description: Core clinical domain managing patient health reports including upload, storage, retrieval, and audit workflows. Supports multiple report types (images, PDFs, text) with cloud storage integration and strict permission controls ensuring patients can only access their own reports while doctors can view their assigned patients' reports.

sub_modules.name: Health Report API Controller
sub_modules.description: BFF layer handling HTTP requests for health report operations. Implements dual-layer security with role-based access control and resource ownership validation.
key_functions: uploadReport - Handle file upload with security validation
queryReportList - Paginated report listing with filters
getReportDetail - Single report retrieval with ownership check

sub_modules.name: Health Report Service
sub_modules.description: Dubbo RPC service implementing core report business logic including file processing, OSS integration, patient-doctor relationship validation, and audit status management.
key_functions: uploadReport - Process upload with OSS and persistence
queryReportList - Dynamic query with multiple filters
convertToVO - Enrich report data with user names

sub_modules.name: Health Report Data Models
sub_modules.description: Data transfer objects and persistent entities for health reports including report types, audit status, and category classifications.
key_functions: HealthReport - Core entity with audit workflow fields
HealthReportVO - View object with enriched display data

sub_modules.name: Report Exception Handling
sub_modules.description: Global exception handler providing unified error responses for the health report consumer service.

domain_modules.name: Doctor Service Domain
domain_modules.description: Clinical workflow domain supporting doctor workbench functionality including AI-powered schedule recommendations, appointment management, and patient care tracking. Implements complete schedule lifecycle from creation through completion with diagnostic report uploads.

sub_modules.name: Doctor Workbench Controller
sub_modules.description: REST API controller for doctor-facing operations with comprehensive security controls. All endpoints require DOCTOR role with specific read/write permissions.

sub_modules.name: Doctor Workbench Service
sub_modules.description: Core service implementing doctor schedule management with AI integration, state machine workflow, and strict ownership validation using optimistic locking.

sub_modules.name: Doctor Service Data Models
sub_modules.description: Entities and value objects for doctor profiles, schedules, and categories with status and priority enumerations.
key_functions: ScheduleVO - Display model with resolved names

domain_modules.name: Message System Domain
domain_modules.description: Communication infrastructure domain handling multi-channel message delivery including in-app notifications, SMS, and email. Supports message templates, batch sending, read tracking, and message lifecycle management.

sub_modules.name: Message API Controller
sub_modules.description: REST endpoints for message operations including sending, querying, marking as read, and managing message lifecycle.

sub_modules.name: Message Service
sub_modules.description: Core message processing service handling persistence, recipient management, and coordination with external delivery channels.

sub_modules.name: SMS Service
sub_modules.description: SMS delivery service with rate limiting to prevent abuse and integration with third-party SMS providers.
key_functions: sendSMS - Deliver SMS with rate limiting

sub_modules.name: Email Service
sub_modules.description: Email delivery service supporting plain text and attachment emails through third-party integration.

sub_modules.name: Message Template Service
sub_modules.description: Template management for standardized message content with variable substitution support.

sub_modules.name: Message Data Models
sub_modules.description: Entities for messages, recipients, and templates with status and type enumerations.

domain_modules.name: API Gateway Domain
domain_modules.description: Infrastructure domain serving as the unified entry point for all client requests. Handles cross-cutting concerns including JWT authentication, request routing, rate limiting via Sentinel, CORS configuration, and user context injection into downstream services.

sub_modules.name: JWT Authentication Filter
sub_modules.description: Global filter that validates JWT tokens for protected routes, extracts user information, and injects it into request headers for downstream services.
key_functions: filter - Validate token and inject user headers
extractToken - Parse Bearer token from request
injectUserContext - Add user info to downstream headers

sub_modules.name: Sentinel Rate Limiting
sub_modules.description: Flow control and circuit breaker configuration using Alibaba Sentinel for API protection.
key_functions: configureFlowRules - Set rate limits per route

sub_modules.name: Gateway Configuration
sub_modules.description: Core gateway configurations including CORS, HTTP client settings, and context propagation for distributed tracing.
key_functions: corsFilter - Configure allowed origins and methods

sub_modules.name: Permission Client
sub_modules.description: Dubbo client for invoking permission validation services from the account management domain.
key_functions: getUserPermissions - Fetch user permissions for injection

domain_modules.name: Third-Party Integration Domain
domain_modules.description: Adapter domain encapsulating all external service integrations including cloud storage (Alibaba OSS), SMS providers, and email services. Provides a unified interface for other domains to access third-party capabilities.

sub_modules.name: OSS Service
sub_modules.description: Object storage service wrapper for Alibaba Cloud OSS providing file upload, download, and management capabilities.
key_functions: uploadFile - Single file upload to OSS

sub_modules.name: SMS Provider Service
sub_modules.description: SMS gateway integration for sending verification codes and notifications through third-party SMS providers.
key_functions: sendSMS - Deliver SMS via external provider

sub_modules.name: Email Provider Service
sub_modules.description: Email service integration supporting both plain text and attachment-based email delivery.

sub_modules.name: Third-Party DTOs
sub_modules.description: Data transfer objects for third-party service requests and responses.

domain_modules.name: Common Utilities Domain
domain_modules.description: Cross-cutting infrastructure domain providing shared utilities, security components, and common abstractions used across all microservices. Includes user context management, permission annotations, data encryption, and standardized response structures.

sub_modules.name: User Context Management
sub_modules.description: ThreadLocal-based user context propagation enabling access to current user information throughout the request lifecycle.
key_functions: setUserContext - Store user info in ThreadLocal

sub_modules.name: Security Annotations & AOP
sub_modules.description: Declarative security framework with @RequireRole and @RequirePermission annotations backed by AOP aspect for enforcement.

sub_modules.name: User Info Interceptor
sub_modules.description: Spring MVC interceptor that extracts user information from Gateway-injected headers and populates the user context.
key_functions: preHandle - Extract user headers and set context

sub_modules.name: Sensitive Data Encryption
sub_modules.description: MyBatis TypeHandler for transparent AES encryption/decryption of sensitive database fields.

sub_modules.name: XSS & SQL Injection Prevention
sub_modules.description: Security utilities for filtering malicious input including HTML sanitization and SQL injection detection.

sub_modules.name: Common Response & Pagination
sub_modules.description: Standardized API response wrappers and pagination utilities for consistent data structures.

sub_modules.name: Exception Handling
sub_modules.description: Custom exception classes for business error handling with error codes.

sub_modules.name: HTTP Utilities
sub_modules.description: HTTP client utilities for making external API calls.

domain_relations.description: Gateway invokes TokenValidationAPI via Dubbo RPC to validate JWT tokens for every protected request. Extracts user identity and permissions from validated tokens to inject into downstream service headers.
Gateway may call PermissionServiceAPI to fetch user permissions for advanced authorization scenarios and to populate user context headers.
Auth server calls AccountManagementAPI for user credential verification during login and PermissionServiceAPI to fetch user permissions for JWT claim population.
Health report service calls UserIdentityAPI to retrieve patient and doctor information for report association and to resolve display names for report views.
Health report service calls OSSAPI to upload report files (images, PDFs) to cloud storage and retrieve file URLs for storage in report records.
Health report consumer uses UserInfoManager for user context, security annotations for access control, and Result wrapper for API responses.
Doctor service calls UserIdentityAPI to retrieve doctor profiles and patient information for schedule management and display enrichment.
Doctor consumer uses security annotations (@RequireRole, @RequirePermission), UserInfoManager for context, and standard response utilities.
Message service calls account APIs to resolve recipient user information and validate user existence before message delivery.
Message service calls SMSAPI and EmailAPI to deliver notifications through external SMS and email providers.
Message system uses common utilities for response formatting, pagination, and basic infrastructure support.
Auth server uses common utilities for response formatting, exception handling, and trace ID management.
Account management heavily uses SensitiveDataEncryptHandler for field encryption, exception classes for error handling, and utility functions.
Gateway uses common constants and potentially trace ID utilities for distributed tracing propagation.
Third-party services use common utilities for HTTP operations, response formatting, and trace ID propagation.

business_flows.name: User Authentication Flow
business_flows.description: Complete authentication process from user login through JWT token issuance. Supports multiple login methods (username, phone, ID card) and implements dual-token mechanism with access and refresh tokens.

steps.operation: Receive login request and route to auth-consumer service (login endpoints are whitelisted)
Process login request, validate credentials via AccountClient
Verify credentials against stored BCrypt hash, retrieve user roles and permissions
Expand role codes to permission strings (e.g., DOCTOR:READ, DOCTOR:WRITE)
Generate access token (30min) and refresh token (7 days) with user claims, store refresh token in Redis
Return token pair and user info to client

business_flows.name: API Request Authorization Flow
business_flows.description: Validates JWT tokens and enforces role/permission-based access control for protected API endpoints. Extracts user context and propagates to downstream services.

steps.operation: Extract Bearer token from Authorization header, skip validation for whitelisted paths
Validate token signature, check expiration, verify not in blacklist, extract user claims
Inject user context headers (X-User-Id, X-Username, X-User-Roles, X-User-Authorities) into downstream request
Extract user headers and populate ThreadLocal UserInfoManager in target service
Evaluate @RequireRole and @RequirePermission annotations via AOP aspect
Clear ThreadLocal context after request completion

business_flows.entry_point: Any protected API endpoint through Gateway

business_flows.name: Health Report Upload Flow
business_flows.description: Patient uploads health report (image, PDF, or text) which is stored in cloud OSS and persisted with metadata. Includes file validation, ownership verification, and automatic doctor association.

steps.operation: Receive multipart upload request, validate file type/size, verify patient role and ownership
Validate request parameters, fetch patient info to get attending doctor ID
Query patient record to retrieve attendingDoctorId for report association
Upload file bytes to Alibaba Cloud OSS, return permanent file URL
Create HealthReport entity with file URL, set status to PENDING, persist to database

business_flows.name: Doctor Schedule Management Flow
business_flows.description: Doctor views, creates, and manages daily schedules with AI-powered recommendations. Supports complete lifecycle from scheduling through completion with diagnostic report submission.

steps.operation: Receive schedule request, validate DOCTOR role and doctor:read/write permissions
Generate AI-based schedule suggestions (currently mock), return recommended schedules
Query existing schedules with filters (date, status, category, priority)
Update schedule status (PENDING→IN_PROGRESS→COMPLETED) with state validation and optimistic locking
Complete schedule with mandatory diagnostic report, prescription, and notes

business_flows.name: Token Refresh Flow
business_flows.description: Exchange valid refresh token for new access token, enabling seamless session extension without re-authentication.

steps.operation: Receive refresh token request from client
Validate refresh token signature, verify exists in Redis and not revoked
Extract userId and roles from refresh token claims
Fetch latest user permissions (may have changed since last login)
Generate new access token with updated permissions, optionally rotate refresh token

business_flows.name: Multi-Channel Message Delivery Flow
business_flows.description: Send notifications to users through multiple channels (in-app, SMS, email) with template support and delivery tracking.

steps.operation: Receive message send request with channel selection (push/SMS/email)
Create message record, resolve template if specified, persist to database
Retrieve recipient contact information (phone, email) for delivery
Check rate limit, format SMS content, call third-party SMS provider
Deliver SMS through external gateway
Format email content, call third-party email provider
Deliver email through SMTP/email service

business_flows.name: User Logout Flow
business_flows.description: Secure logout process that revokes both access and refresh tokens, preventing further use of the session.

steps.operation: Receive logout request with access token
Parse token to extract tokenId and expiration time
Add access token to Redis blacklist with TTL matching token expiration
Revoke associated refresh token from Redis storage

data.architecture_summary:
The ChronicCareAIPlatform implements a microservices architecture built on Spring Boot with Dubbo RPC for inter-service communication. The system follows a clear three-tier module pattern (API/Consumer/Provider) promoting interface-driven development and clean separation of concerns.

**Architecture Layers:**
1. **API Gateway Layer**: Spring Cloud Gateway handles routing, JWT validation, rate limiting (Sentinel), and user context propagation to downstream services.

2. **BFF/Consumer Layer**: Thin HTTP controllers that receive REST requests, apply security annotations, and delegate to Provider services via Dubbo RPC.

3. **Provider/Service Layer**: Dubbo services implementing core business logic with MyBatis-Plus for data access.

4. **API Contract Layer**: Shared modules (-api) containing interfaces, DTOs, and entities ensuring type-safe RPC communication.

**Key Architectural Patterns:**
- **Dual-Token Authentication**: Access tokens (30min) + Refresh tokens (7 days) with Redis-backed blacklist and session storage
- **Declarative Security**: @RequireRole/@RequirePermission annotations with AOP enforcement
- **User Context Propagation**: Gateway injects user claims as HTTP headers, extracted via ThreadLocal interceptors in services
- **RBAC Permission Model**: Role-based access (DOCTOR/PATIENT/FAMILY) with expandable action-based permissions (READ/WRITE/ALL)
- **Sensitive Data Encryption**: AES-CBC encryption at persistence layer via MyBatis TypeHandler

**Domain Organization:**
- Core Business: Authentication, Account Management, Health Reports, Doctor Services
- Supporting: Message System for notifications
- Infrastructure: API Gateway, Third-Party Integrations (OSS/SMS/Email), Common Utilities

**Technology Stack:**
- Runtime: Spring Boot 3.x, Dubbo 3.x
- Data: MySQL + MyBatis-Plus, Redis for caching/sessions
- Security: Spring Security, JWT (Nimbus), BCrypt
- Infrastructure: Nacos (service discovery), Sentinel (rate limiting), Alibaba Cloud OSS
